error.signature: BUSY Redis is busy running a script. You can only call SCRIPT KILL or SHUTDOWN NOSAVE.

verdict.summary: A Lua script or Redis function is running longer than lua-time-limit (default 5s), blocking all other commands.

dead_ends.action: Use SHUTDOWN NOSAVE to stop the script
dead_ends.why_fails: SHUTDOWN terminates the entire Redis server; all connected clients lose their connection and unsaved data is lost

dead_ends.action: Increase lua-time-limit to avoid the BUSY error
dead_ends.why_fails: Longer limit means longer blocking periods; all other clients are frozen while Lua executes

workarounds.action: Use SCRIPT KILL to terminate the running script
workarounds.how: redis-cli SCRIPT KILL  # only works if the script has NOT performed any writes yet

workarounds.action: If script has written data, use SHUTDOWN NOSAVE only as last resort
workarounds.how: SCRIPT KILL fails after writes; SHUTDOWN NOSAVE + restart loses unsaved changes. Consider the tradeoff.

workarounds.action: Fix the Lua script to avoid long execution
workarounds.how: Break large operations into batches; use SCAN instead of KEYS; avoid O(n) operations on large sets
